title: Subaru’s new EVs are already outselling the Solterra
summary: Just months after arriving at dealerships, Subaru’s new electric SUVs are outselling the Solterra.

title: Kempower + PowerUp kick off a 12-site EV fast charging rollout
summary: Kempower and charge point operator PowerUp America have opened a new public DC fast charging station in Manchester, Kentucky – the first of 12 charging projects the companies are building together in the Southeast.

title: Ford’s $30,000 EV pickup captured testing again as new details emerge
summary: Ford’s midsize electric pickup was spotted testing again, revealing a few new details and a sneak peek at the interior.

title: Toyota’s electric SUV clears 17,500 sales, outpacing the Land Cruiser and key EV rivals
summary: The new 2026 bZ has emerged as one of America’s best-selling EVs, outselling several of Toyota’s popular SUVs.

title: Sicily is now home to Italy’s largest solar farm
summary: Italy’s largest solar farm is now online, giving the country another boost in clean power as it races to add more renewable energy.

title: Tesla Semi involved in first fatal crash, killing 2 in Nevada
summary:
A Tesla Semi was involved in its first known fatal crash, killing two people on U.S. 50 in Nevada on Sunday morning.

The driver of the Class 8 electric truck reportedly fell asleep before rear-ending two passenger vehicles stopped at a red light, according to preliminary statements from investigators.

title: Juiced Scrambler e-bikes at new lows from $1,694, Baseus X1 Pro solar security camera $140, Greenworks 80V CrossoverZ bundle, more
summary:
We’ve got a collection of post-Prime and July 4th savings stuffed into our midweek Green Deals, led by the Juiced 4th of July Sale on its two Scrambler Moto-Style e-bike variants + a $245 FREE bundle at new lows starting from $1,694. Right behind it is the Baseus X1 Pro Wireless Outdoor Dual-Tracking Solar Security Camera down at $140, as well as the Greenworks 80V 42-inch CrossoverZ Cordless Electric Zero Turn Riding Mower bundled with 6x batteries and a 600W wall charger for $4,700, Jackery’s 80,000mAh Explorer 240D Compact Portable Power Station at $129, an EGO Power+ 400W inverter deal, and plenty of other holiday savings. Plus – don’t forget about the hangover deals we’ve got collected at the bottom of the page for you, like yesterday’s new low price on the Tenways Wayfarer Cruiser e-bike, Jackery’s full Independence Day Sale lineup, and more.

Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

title: Chevy Equinox EV sales slide 41%, but the new Bolt and Cadillac EVs pick up the slack
summary: GM’s best-selling Chevy Equinox EV took a hit after sales dropped 41% in the first half of 2026. The new Chevy Bolt EV and Cadillac’s luxury electric SUVs helped soften the blow.

title: Hyundai sold over 20,000 IONIQ 5 EVs in the first half of 2026, and IONIQ 9 sales are up 380%
summary: The IONIQ 5 continues to rack up impressive sales, topping 20,000 in the first half of 2026. Meanwhile, Hyundai’s three-row electric SUV is gaining traction, with sales up 380%.

title: Kia’s midsize electric SUV gains AWD and a special new ‘Storm’ edition
summary: The new Storm edition variant offers “more bang for your buck,” Kia said after introducing the new special edition model.

title: Slate Has No Plans To Sell Its Cheap EV Pickup In Canada
summary: Slate's affordable electric pickup won't be headed north any time soon.

title: Someone Keeps Stealing Entire Truckloads Of Tesla Batteries
summary: Thieves have made off with trailers loaded with Tesla battery packs straight from the factory nearly a dozen times since December.

title: California's New EV Incentive Is Almost Here—With Special Benefits For Rivian And Lucid
summary: One key restriction on the $135 million incentive program won't apply to vehicles from California-based EV brands.

title: BMW iX5 Blows Away The Competition With 460-kW Charging, 435-Mile Range
summary: The iX5 gets the largest battery pack ever installed in an electric BMW.

title: An App Flagged This Tesla Battery As Degraded. The Car Said It Was Worse
summary: A four-year-old Model 3 Performance scored 88% battery health in Tesla's own test—lower than its owner expected, but close to a prediction by a third-party app.

title: Drivers Are Not Happy With Their Cars' Screens
summary: Infotainment screens are the one area in cars where initial quality has gotten worse year-over-year, a study found.

title: Slate's Cheap EV Pickup Is Surprisingly Easy To Make Expensive
summary: Slate's $25,000 electric pickup is refreshingly simple, but its endless menu of accessories can quickly add up to something else.

title: Shell Built A Tiny EV With Hyper-Fast Charging And A New Cooling System
summary: This tiny EV is impressively clever, but the real business case is hiding in the coolant.

title: How Hankook Is Making EV Tires Better
summary: The company's line of iON tires is designed to maximize durability and range. You can experience them yourself at Electrify Expo Demo Days.

title: Tesla Is Giving Away Free Supercharging. Here's How To Win.
summary: Tesla is gamifying charging and will reward the winners with free Supercharging for the life of the car. Here's how to win.
